description: Machine-readable index of AINP v1.0.0 conformance rules. Semantics are normative in specification/AINP_Protocol.md §10; this index is for tooling/dashboards.

plan_rules.summary: required fields; semver version; closed enums; non-empty acceptance_criteria
inputs source/rights/provenance; consent evidence discipline; tag consent mapping; rights consent_required requires a consent record
acceptance criteria shape; registered static check_id

risk_profile present; high-risk => approval_required (HSAW gate); artifact_type high-risk membership is case/separator-normalized; tags closed domain; self-declared high/critical risk_level gates; high_risk_types shape/non-empty data fail-closed
disclosure_policy universally declared; tag disclosure mapping
bindings structure; execution protocol enum; local target existence
red-line constraints carry enforced_by control points
unverifiable never satisfies a red line
release: red lines need an operational control point
if content_architecture is declared, safe content root/files, unique file/point ids, ordered points and acceptance_refs bind to real criteria
space hash recompute; absolute or sandbox-escaping local refs fail

report_rules.summary: evidence discipline per result; method/verifier/evidence shape and value domains
conformant derivable from fail-level results + disclosure/approval gates, never self-set
all required disclosure policy switches recorded as satisfied, including generator metadata and watermark evidence when declared
plan_ref hash lock (current or archived blob)
approval_required plans require report-side approval_gate evidence with legal method/evidence/verifier shape
report artifacts cover required plan content files via file_id and matching paths

project_rules.summary: project root is an existing <name>_ainp directory
uppercase AINP.md required; lowercase ainp.md rejected
ainp/ AINP plan folder exists and matches AINP.md
<name>/ content directory exists and matches AINP.md
AINP.md frontmatter/body complete; paths are project-root relative and non-escaping

approved/active AINP.md feedback is required; feedback/optional space pass bundled JSON Schema and strict rule validation; feedback generation_id matches plan/report; issue file_id/point_id targets bind to plan content architecture
declared plan/report pass release gate with project root as artifact sandbox; report artifacts resolve under AINP.md content_dir
delegated release gate requires report overall.conformant=true; surfaced through release-family findings such as AINP_E_RELEASE_NOT_CONFORMANT rather than a dedicated P8 code
AINP.md must not self-declare artifact trust
complete project packages require plan content_architecture, and its root/files resolve under AINP.md content_dir

optional ainp/references/ may contain protocol/spec snapshots, templates, briefs and other generation references; missing manifest warns, declared/present manifest must pass schema, local paths stay under ainp/references/, recorded local hashes recompute, and external_uri entries are not fetched or allowed to carry sha256 anchors

note: G10 was renumbered to R8 during plan V3.
